title: An automated system and method for identifying target payment mode/s for electronic payment transaction
abstract: The present invention relates to an automated system [100] and method [300] identifying a target payment mode among a plurality of payment modes present in a payment request received from a user. In an embodiment, the system [100] comprises a user device [110], a merchant device [120] and a central server [130]. The central server [130] retrieves payment related information from the payment request received from the user. Further, the central server [130] processes the payment related information by identifying the target payment mode and determines if the user is authorised for said transaction/s. In case the user is authorised, the central server records the electronic payment transaction of the user transaction account and the merchant associated with the transaction performed.
claims:
Claims WE CLAIM: 1. An automated method [300] for identifying a target payment mode for an electronic payment transaction, the method [300] being performed by a central server [130], the method [300] comprising: -retrieving payment related information from a payment request received from the user via one of a physical mode and an online mode issued by an issuing bank [115], wherein the payment related information comprises a payment amount, a user transaction account and a merchant associated with the payment request, and the payment request comprises the plurality of available payment modes for the electronic payment transaction; -processing the payment related information, wherein said processing comprises steps of: identifying the target payment mode among the plurality of available payment modes based on one of pre-defined rules and real time rules, and determining if the user is authorised for the electronic payment transaction based on one or more transaction checking parameters; and -in an event of successful authorisation, managing the electronic payment transaction between the user transaction account and the merchant associated with the payment request, through the target payment mode. 2. The method [300] as claimed in claiml, further comprising transmitting a notification to at least one of the user and a merchant indicating one of a success transaction and a failure transaction. 3. The method [300] as claimed in claiml, further comprising storing the target payment mode, the plurality of target payment modes and the payment related information. 4. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the user payment account and the merchant are virtual platforms linked to each other through a central server [130]. 5. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the payment request is received from the user to link the electronic payment transaction with the merchant . 6. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the physical mode refers to a physical smart card issued by the issuing bank [115]. 7. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the online mode refers to internet banking issued by the issuing bank [115]. 8. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the plurality of payment modes comprises at least one of a net-banking, an online wallet, a debit card, a credit card and magnetic secured transmissions (MST). 9. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein one of the pre-defined rules and the real time rules are defined by one of the user and the central server [130]. 10. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the one or more transaction checking parameters comprises at least one of split payment checks, primary account checks, AML checks, fraud detection checks, typologies checks and balance checks. 11. The method [300] as claimed in claim 1, wherein the electronic payment transaction is managed by debiting the payment amount from the user transaction account, and crediting the payment amount to a merchant transaction account 12. An automated central server [130] for identifying a target payment mode for an electronic payment transaction, the automated central server [130] comprising: -a direct debit unit [202] configured to: receive a payment request received from the user via one of a physical mode and an online mode issued by an issuing bank [115], wherein the payment related information comprises a payment amount, a user transaction account and a merchant , and the payment request comprises the plurality of available payment modes for the electronic payment transaction, and retrieve payment related information from the payment request; and -a rule engine [204] comprising pre-defined rules and real time rules; and -a processing unit [206] configured to: process the payment related information, wherein said processing comprises steps of: identifying the target payment mode among the plurality of available payment modes based on one of pre-defined rules and real time rules, and determining if the user is 

 authorised for the electronic payment transaction based on one or more transaction checking parameters, and in an event of successful authorisation, record the electronic payment transaction of the user transaction account and the merchant associated therewith. 13. The central server [130] as claimed in claim 12, further comprising a memory unit [208] configured to store the one or more payment modes, the plurality of payment modes and the payment related information. 14. The central server [130] as claimed in claim 12, wherein the direct debit unit [202] is configured to transmit a notification to at least one of the user and a merchant indicating one of a success transaction and a failure transaction.
